mapper.sql: id, title, source_url, video_url, status, latency_ms, page_title, remark, is_cached, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_collection (title, source_url, video_url, status, latency_ms, page_title, remark) VALUES (#{title}, #{sourceUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{status}, #{latencyMs}, #{pageTitle}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video_collection WHERE source_url = #{sourceUrl} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE video_collection SET remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE video_collection SET is_cached = #{isCached} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM video_collection WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video_collection WHERE status IN (0, 2) ORDER BY created_at DESC
